description: Create a UML Deployment Diagram in EdrawMax for a Warehouse Management System (WMS). The diagram must feature five device nodes: 'Client Browser', 'Web Server', 'Application Server', 'Database Server', and 'Cache Server'. Within these nodes, deploy the following artifacts: 'Nginx Reverse Proxy' and 'WMS Frontend (React)' on the Web Server; 'WMS API (Spring Boot)', 'Inventory Service', and 'Order Processing Service' on the Application Server; 'PostgreSQL 15' and 'WMS Production Database' on the Database Server; and 'Redis 7.0' and 'Session Store' on the Cache Server. Establish communication paths between nodes labeled with the protocols: '«HTTPS»' (Client to Web), '«HTTP/REST»' (Web to App), '«JDBC/TCP:5432»' (App to DB), and '«TCP:6379»' (App to Cache). Save the source file to /home/ga/Diagrams/wms_deployment_diagram.eddx and export a PNG image to /home/ga/Diagrams/wms_deployment_diagram.png.
